titleStmt.title: SII 42.265: original edition by C Somasundara Rao
No. 265. (A.R. No. 28 of 1956-57.) Nāgārjunakoṇḍa, Palnad Taluk, Guntur District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a sculptured lintel lying in trenches C 4 and D 4 in Division 180 of sector No. 2(?).
This inscription is written in the Sanskrit language and the Brāhmī script of 3rd century A.D. It is dated in the king's regnal year 24, varshā, paksha 4, divasa 5.
Records that the stone image of Buddha was installed by a Śrēshṭhin Kumāranandin.
(Published in Ep. Ind., Vol. XXXV, pp. 11-13).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p: Sidhaṁ siddham [.] mahārājasya Ikshvākunāṁ(ṇāṁ) śrī-Ehavala-Chantamūlasya samva(saṁva)tsaraṁ chaturvvīśaṁ varsha-pakshaṁ chaturtthaṁ divasaṁ pañchamaṁ Śrīparvvate Vijayapū(pu)ryyāṁ Mahādevī-pariveṇe Iru[sakā(?)]nāṁkulaprasū tasya Ba[raṇa?]kīyānāṁ(nām) I(I)śvaradattasya putreṇa Syandaka-parvvata-śreshṭhinā Kumāranandinā saha bharyyāya śreshṭhinīya putreṇa cha Iśvarabharttinā śesheṇa cha svajana-sambandhi-varggeṇa Iyaṁ bhagavatoḥ(taḥ) sartva(rvva)-satvo(ttv-o)ttamasya sarvva-guṇa-pārami(mī)-prāptasya samyak-sambuddhasya Buddhasya śailamayī pratimā pratishṭhāpitā Ātmaṇaḥ sarvva-satvā(ttvā)nāñ=cha hita-sukh-ārtthaṁ(rttham .) bhavati ch=ātra ślokā(kaḥ) . Deya-dharmmam=ida(ma)ṅ=kṛitvā yat=puṇyaṁ samupārjjitaṁ(tam) . tena puṇyeṇa(na) loko=yaṁ nirvvāṇam=adhigachchhatu .
Digital edition of SII 42.265 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
